recommendations.title: Wildcat
recommendations.overview: An ex-black ops team reunite to pull off a desperate heist in order to save the life of their leader’s eight-year-old daughter.

recommendations.title: Spectral
recommendations.overview: A special-ops team is dispatched to fight supernatural beings that have taken over a European city.

recommendations.title: Extraction 2
recommendations.overview: Back from the brink of death, highly skilled commando Tyler Rake takes on another dangerous mission: saving the imprisoned family of a ruthless gangster.

recommendations.title: Foxy Brown
recommendations.overview: A voluptuous black woman takes a job as a high-class prostitute in order to get revenge on the mobsters who murdered her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: The Mimic
recommendations.overview: The mother of a missing child takes in a lost girl she finds in the woods, but soon begins to wonder if she is even human.

recommendations.title: Ava
recommendations.overview: A black ops assassin is forced to fight for her own survival after a job goes dangerously wrong.

recommendations.title: Gunpowder Milkshake
recommendations.overview: To protect an 8-year-old girl, a dangerous assassin reunites with her mother and her lethal associates to take down a ruthless crime syndicate and its army of henchmen.

recommendations.title: A Working Man

recommendations.title: The Suspect
recommendations.overview: Betrayed and on the run, a former North Korean agent tries to seek revenge on the man who killed his wife, find his missing daughter, and uncover the secrets hidden inside the eyeglasses of a dead man.

recommendations.title: The Painter
